title: Better Minecraft Custom
description: Better Minecraft Custom is a mode pack created by Eqinox (myself) which brings together a variety of modes allowing you to customize Minecraft without distorting it.
body:
Better Minecraft Custom is a modpack designed to enhance the Minecraft experience by adding new features while retaining the essence of the original game. It incorporates a variety of carefully selected mods to optimize gameplay and add features without altering the game.

I update the ModPack for each new version of Minecraft and add features regularly.
